findings.title: Hardcoded API key committed in source
findings.evidence: raw diff adds `apiKey: "sk-abcdefghijklmnop"` to the exported `provider` object in src/provider.ts; the literal `sk-...` key is committed in source rather than read from an environment variable or secret store.

notes: Diff Drift flagged exactly one high-severity hardcoded-secret on src/provider.ts and the raw git diff corroborates it: the only change is adding the `apiKey` literal to the exported config object.
The added line exports the key (`export const provider`), so the secret is also part of the module's public API surface — anything importing `provider` gets the key.
Only one file changed and it was analyzed; no skipped/too-large files in this packet.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 blind run against the engine-v2 binary; packet-only context.
